UserDialog.DialogText: Please finish the level 51 MSQ quest 'Purple Flame, Purple Flame' to unlock Coerthas Western Highlands Flying.

If.Condition: IsQuestCompleted(67134) and not IsQuestCompleted(67280) and Core.Player.ClassLevel > 49

LLToast.message: Working on quest 'Bridge Over Frozen Water' to unlock AetherCurrent

If.Condition: IsQuestCompleted(67142) and not IsQuestCompleted(67647) and Core.Player.ClassLevel > 50

LLToast.message: Working on quest 'For All the Nights to Come' to unlock AetherCurrent

LogMessage.Message: You are not eligible for the For All the Nights to Come quest.
Skipping for now...

UserDialog.DialogText: In order to unlock Coerthas Western Highlands Aether Currents the 4 man duty The Dusk Vigil must be completed.\nPlease either do so now, or press continue to skip this step and complete it later.

If.Condition: IsQuestCompleted(67142) and not IsQuestCompleted(67296) and Core.Player.ClassLevel > 50

LLToast.message: Working on quest 'Baby Steps' to unlock AetherCurrent

LogMessage.Message: You are not eligible for the Baby Steps quest.
Skipping for now...

If.Condition: IsQuestCompleted(67143) and not IsQuestCompleted(67295) and Core.Player.ClassLevel > 50

LLToast.message: Working on quest 'Protecting What's Important' to unlock AetherCurrent

LogMessage.Message: You are not eligible for the Protecting What's Important quest.
Skipping for now...
You've attuned to the Aether Currents in Coerthas Western Highlands!

UserDialog.DialogText: Please finish the level 53 MSQ quest 'Mourn in Passing' to unlock The Dravanian Forelands Aether Currents.

If.Condition: IsQuestCompleted(67145) and not IsQuestCompleted(67307) and Core.Player.ClassLevel > 51

LLToast.message: Working on quest 'Some Bad News' to unlock AetherCurrent

LogMessage.Message: You are not eligible for the Some Bad News quest.
Skipping for now...

If.Condition: IsQuestCompleted(67150) and not IsQuestCompleted(67338) and Core.Player.ClassLevel > 52

LLToast.message: Working on quest 'A Lesson in Humility' to unlock AetherCurrent

LogMessage.Message: You are not eligible for the A Lesson in Humility quest.
Skipping for now...

If.Condition: IsQuestCompleted(67149) and not IsQuestCompleted(67326) and Core.Player.ClassLevel > 52

LLToast.message: Working on quest 'Stolen Munitions' to unlock AetherCurrent

LogMessage.Message: You are not eligible for the Natural Repellent quest.
Skipping for now...

If.Condition: IsQuestCompleted(67150) and not IsQuestCompleted(67333) and Core.Player.ClassLevel > 52

LLToast.message: Working on quest 'The Hunter Becomes the Kweh' to unlock AetherCurrent

LogMessage.Message: You are not eligible for the Natural Repellent quest.
Skipping for now...

If.Condition: HasQuest(67333) and not IsQuestCompleted(67333) and GetQuestStep(67333) == 1 and GetQuestById(67333).GetTodoArgs(1, 0).Item1 == 0
HasQuest(67333) and not IsQuestCompleted(67333) and GetQuestStep(67333) == 1 and GetQuestById(67333).GetTodoArgs(1, 0).Item1 == 1
HasQuest(67333) and not IsQuestCompleted(67333) and GetQuestStep(67333) == 1 and GetQuestById(67333).GetTodoArgs(1, 0).Item1 == 2

LogMessage.Message: You've attuned to the Aether Currents in The Dravanian Forelands!

UserDialog.DialogText: Please finish the level 55 MSQ quest 'Into the Aery' to unlock Churning Mists Aether Currents.

If.Condition: QuestCompleted(67156) and not IsQuestCompleted(67355) and Core.Player.ClassLevel > 53

LLToast.message: Working on quest 'The Bathing Bully' to unlock AetherCurrent

LogMessage.Message: You are not eligible for The Bathing Bully quest.
Skipping for now...

If.Condition: IsQuestCompleted(67163) and not IsQuestCompleted(67371) and Core.Player.ClassLevel > 53

LLToast.message: Working on quest 'Waiting to Inhale' to unlock AetherCurrent

LogMessage.Message: You are not eligible for the Waiting to Inhale quest.
Skipping for now...

If.Condition: IsQuestCompleted(67160) and not IsQuestCompleted(67359) and Core.Player.ClassLevel > 53

LLToast.message: Working on quest 'Road Kill' to unlock AetherCurrent

LogMessage.Message: You are not eligible for the Road Kill quest.
Skipping for now...

If.Condition: IsQuestCompleted(67164) and not IsQuestCompleted(67364) and Core.Player.ClassLevel > 53

LLToast.message: Working on quest 'Hide Your Moogles' to unlock AetherCurrent

LogMessage.Message: You are not eligible for the Road Kill quest.
Skipping for now...

If.Condition: HasQuest(67364) and not IsQuestCompleted(67364) and GetQuestStep(67364) == 1 and GetQuestById(67364).GetTodoArgs(1, 0).Item1 == 0
HasQuest(67364) and not IsQuestCompleted(67364) and GetQuestStep(67364) == 1 and GetQuestById(67364).GetTodoArgs(1, 0).Item1 == 1
HasQuest(67364) and not IsQuestCompleted(67364) and GetQuestStep(67364) == 1 and GetQuestById(67364).GetTodoArgs(1, 0).Item1 == 2

LogMessage.Message: You've attuned to the Aether Currents in Churning Mists!

UserDialog.DialogText: Please finish the level 57 MSQ quest 'Bolt, Chain, and Island' to unlock The Sea of Clouds Aether Currents.

If.Condition: IsQuestCompleted(67134) and not IsQuestCompleted(67284) and Core.Player.ClassLevel > 49

LLToast.message: Working on quest 'Clipped Wings' to unlock AetherCurrent

If.Condition: IsQuestCompleted(67173) and not IsQuestCompleted(67410) and Core.Player.ClassLevel > 55

LLToast.message: Working on quest 'Honoring the Past' to unlock AetherCurrent

If.Condition: IsQuestCompleted(67182) and not IsQuestCompleted(67445) and Core.Player.ClassLevel > 56

LLToast.message: Working on quest 'Sleepless in Ok' Zundu' to unlock AetherCurrent

If.Condition: IsQuestCompleted(67182) and not IsQuestCompleted(67446) and Core.Player.ClassLevel > 56

LLToast.message: Working on quest 'Flying the Nest' to unlock AetherCurrent

LogMessage.Message: You've attuned to the Aether Currents in The Sea of Clouds!

UserDialog.DialogText: Please finish the level 59 MSQ quest 'Forbiden Knowledge' to unlock The Dravanian Hinterlands Aether Currents.

LogMessage.Message: You are not eligible for the Louder than Words quest.
Skipping for now...

Skipping for now...
You've attuned to the Aether Currents in The Dravanian Hinterlands!

UserDialog.DialogText: Please manually complete the Lvl. 51 Duty Dusk Vigil. You can do this quickly on a Max level Character Unsynced./n/nRestart the bot once done!

If.Condition: AetherCurrentManager.IsZoneComplete(397) and AetherCurrentManager.IsZoneComplete(398) and AetherCurrentManager.IsZoneComplete(399) and AetherCurrentManager.IsZoneComplete(400) and AetherCurrentManager.IsZoneComplete(401)
